name: Onion and Tomato Tart with Anchovies 10/11/96
recipeIngredient: 2 cups ripe tomatoes, diced and seeded
3/4 cup pitted Nicoise olives (or Kalamata olives cut in half)
2-ounce can of anchovy fillets, rinsed and patted dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 500°F.
2. Prepare the pizza dough according to a separate recipe and let it rise in a warm place while preparing the toppings.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a sauté pan. Sauté onions, garlic, oregano, rosemary, and parsley over moderate heat until lightly browned. Add tomatoes and remove from heat. Season with salt and pepper and cool.
4. Roll out the dough into a large rectangle, about 1/4-inch thick, and place it on a pizza peel or the back of a baking sheet sprinkled with cornmeal.
5. Spread the tomato-onion mixture evenly over the dough, leaving a 1/2-inch border at the edge.
6. Arrange the anchovies in a lattice pattern on top and place a pitted olive in each section.
7. Drizzle the remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil over the tart.
8. Slide the tart onto the brick or tiles in the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the crust is golden and crisp.
9. Serve warm or at room temperature.
Yield: 4-6 servings
